title: Zapier fields with Monday.com
excerpt:

posts.author: flyworx (Roman M)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello. Why when choosing “new pulse on board on Monday” in zapier to link fields it does not show all separate puls columns like it does with most other services integrated with zapier?

Example - we are trying to create a new folder in box.com when new pulse is created in a board. The only choices we have to choose from “monday fields” are name and column values (all in one line)… Why are these columns do not show up as separate fields so we can map them to box.com?

posts.author: chrisflavours (Chris Watts)
posts.cookedHtml: Im keen for help on this topic as well. Trying to may columns on my pulses to fields in pandadoc
